Package com.sunilos.p4.util

    Description

    DataUtility
    Data Utility class to format data from one format to another

    This class validates input data
    EmailBuilder
    Class that build Application Email messages
    EmailMessage
    Contains Email Message
    EmailUtility
    Email Utility provides Email Services
    HTMLUtility
    HTML Utility class to produce HTML contents like Dropdown List.
    JDBCDataSource
    JDBC DataSource is a Data Connection Pool
    MessageSource
     
    PropertyReader
    Read the property values from application properties file using Resource Bundle
    ServletUtility
    This is a utility class that provides basic servlet operations like forward, redirect, generic exception handling, access success and error messages, set and get default Bean and List objects, manage pagination parameters
